on and Implementation of the PTIDES Programming Model". Proceedings of the 2008 12th IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Distributed Simulation and Real-Time Applications (DS-RT '08), 330-333, October, 2008. Abstract We have previously proposed PTIDE

, 2008. Abstract We have previously proposed PTIDES (Programming Temporally Integrated Distributed Embedded Systems), a discrete-event framework that binds real time with model time at sensors, actuators, and network interfaces. In this effort we f

ators, and network interfaces. In this effort we focus on performance issues and tradeoffs in PTIDES implementation. We address event processing performance with respect to other distributed discrete event approaches that can be applied in a similar

event approaches that can be applied in a similar setting. The procedure is experimentally evaluated on a distributed setup with standard software and networking components. Electronic downloads PTIDES-DSRT.pdf · application/pdf · 348 kbytes http://d
